pallavi.meaning: I worship Ganapati of Vatapi (Badami), the elephant-faced one who grants boons.

anupallavi.original: भूतादि संसेवित चरणं भूसुर विनुत चरणम्
anupallavi.iast: bhūtādi saṃsevita caraṇaṃ bhūsura vinuta caraṇam
anupallavi.meaning: Whose feet are served by Bhuta (elemental beings) and praised by Bhusuras (brahmins).

charanams.original: विकट कविजन विधित वरवेश विघ्नविनाशन विश्वविनायक
charanams.iast: vikaṭa kavijana vidhita varavēśa vighnavināśana viśvavināyaka
charanams.meaning: Praised by great and playful poets, destroyer of obstacles, leader of the universe.
